rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FRANCISCA CARMELA CARATI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of Patricia Gustafson, Trustee Of The Francisca Carmela Carati Living Trust, To Petition For Order Confirming Interest In Real Property [Ccp 430.10]; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The Court confirmed the sale of the Subject Property to SFCLT on June 17, 2015. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than September 2, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
